scripts.watch:webapp:assets: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const root=process.cwd();const srcDir=path.join(root,'src','webapp');const outDir=path.join(root,'dist','debug','webapp');const files=['index.html','styles.css'];const ensure=()=>fs.mkdirSync(outDir,{recursive:true});const copy=(name)=>{const src=path.join(srcDir,name);const dst=path.join(outDir,name);if(!fs.existsSync(src))return;fs.copyFileSync(src,dst);console.log('[assets] synced '+name);};ensure();files.forEach(copy);console.log('[assets] watching src/webapp/index.html and src/webapp/styles.css');const timers=new Map();fs.watch(srcDir,{persistent:true},(_,file)=>{if(!file)return;const name=String(file);if(!files.includes(name))return;const prev=timers.get(name);if(prev)clearTimeout(prev);const t=setTimeout(()=>{try{copy(name);}catch(err){console.error('[assets] failed syncing '+name+': '+(err.message||err));}timers.delete(name);},50);timers.set(name,t);});"
scripts.prestart: npm run ensure:deps && npm run stop:dev && npm run clean:host-artifacts && npm run prepare:webapp:debug-assets && dotenv -e robogen.debug.env -- npm run build:webapi:debug
scripts.prestart:release: npm run ensure:deps && npm run stop:dev && npm run clean:host-artifacts && dotenv -e robogen.debug.env -- npm run release:build
scripts.release:build: npm run build:webapi && npm run build
scripts.watch:webapp:release:assets: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const root=process.cwd();const srcDir=path.join(root,'src','webapp');const outDir=path.join(root,'dist','release','webapp');const files=['index.html','styles.css'];const ensure=()=>fs.mkdirSync(outDir,{recursive:true});const copy=(name)=>{const src=path.join(srcDir,name);const dst=path.join(outDir,name);if(!fs.existsSync(src))return;fs.copyFileSync(src,dst);console.log('[release-assets] synced '+name);};ensure();files.forEach(copy);console.log('[release-assets] watching src/webapp/index.html and src/webapp/styles.css');const timers=new Map();fs.watch(srcDir,{persistent:true},(_,file)=>{if(!file)return;const name=String(file);if(!files.includes(name))return;const prev=timers.get(name);if(prev)clearTimeout(prev);const t=setTimeout(()=>{try{copy(name);}catch(err){console.error('[release-assets] failed syncing '+name+': '+(err.message||err));}timers.delete(name);},50);timers.set(name,t);});"
scripts.release:web:watch: concurrently --names assets,shadow,serve --prefix-colors magenta,cyan,blue --kill-others --kill-signal SIGTERM "npm run watch:webapp:release:assets" "shadow-cljs watch webapp-release" "npm run release:web:serve"
scripts.release:up: concurrently --names web,api --prefix-colors cyan,green --kill-others --kill-signal SIGTERM "npm run release:web" "npm run release:api"
scripts.dev:web: npm run prepare:webapp:debug-assets && concurrently --names assets,shadow --prefix-colors magenta,cyan --kill-others --kill-signal SIGTERM "npm run watch:webapp:assets" "shadow-cljs watch webapp-debug webapi-debug"
scripts.dev:up: concurrently --names web,api --prefix-colors cyan,green --kill-others --kill-signal SIGTERM "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:api:host"
scripts.build: shadow-cljs release webapp-release && mkdir -p dist/release/webapp && cp src/webapp/index.html src/webapp/styles.css dist/release/webapp/ && cp node_modules/@mantine/core/styles.css dist/release/webapp/mantine.css
scripts.dist:webapi: npm run build:webapi && npm run package:webapi
scripts.test:e2e:env: node scripts/run-with-env.js robogen.test.env -- npm run test:e2e:ui:direct
